description: Middle fragment of a deathbed will of a physician (it seems, for he notes the book of medicine (kitāb al-ṭibb) in his own hand), mentioning a one-eighth share of a house held by him in partnership with a Muslim named Ahmad, as well as something worth 180 dinars which should not be taken away from him after his death. He makes arrangements for his wife after his death. On verso there are a few words in Arabic script (طلع البدر. . . ) (Information from CUDL and Mediterranean Society, II, p. 292; IV, pp. 63, 371.)
description_he: שבר אמצעי מצוואת ערש דווי של רופא (כנראה, שכן הוא מזכיר ספר רפואה בכתב ידו). מזכיר שמינית מבית שמחזיק בשותפות עם מוסלמי בשם אחמד ומשהו ששווה 180 דינרים. עורך הסדרים לאשתו לאחר מותו
